overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character running through ancient Egyptian desert landscape at dawn. The character moves from between sphinx statues along a dirt path past ancient ruins and temples, with lighting transitioning from blue hour to golden hour.

events.description: character exits the sphinx gate area into open desert landscape

agents.ego_description: running forward between two large sphinx statues along a sandy dirt path

entered.detail: large stone sphinx statue with hieroglyphic details on the base
large stone sphinx statue mirroring the left one at the path entrance
sandy dirt trail with visible tire tracks extending into the distance
scattered palm trees visible on the horizon against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs between two massive stone sphinx statues at dawn, exiting an ancient gate into open desert. The blue hour lighting casts long shadows across the sandy path as the character moves toward distant palm trees and acacia trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert path with ancient ruins

events.description: sun rises higher transitioning from blue hour to golden hour with warmer orange tones

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the desert path with ancient ruins visible on the right side

entered.detail: crumbling stone ruins and broken columns scattered on the right side of the path
large rocky desert outcropping with sparse vegetation
large flat-topped acacia tree with spreading canopy ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs through open desert as the lighting warms to golden hour. Ancient stone ruins appear on the right while the character approaches a large acacia tree. The sphinx statues fall behind as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert path with ancient temple structure

events.description: ancient temple with columns becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: running past the large acacia tree with an ancient temple structure now visible on the left

entered.detail: classical ancient Egyptian temple with stone columns and pediment on a raised platform
low stone retaining wall supporting the temple terrace

segments.scene_description: The character passes the large acacia tree and approaches an ancient stone temple with columns on the left. The terrain becomes rockier with more desert vegetation, and the path curves slightly alongside the temple structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled desert path with cypress trees

agents.ego_description: running along a path bordered by a tall stone wall with cypress trees on the left side

entered.detail: tall narrow cypress trees growing along the top of the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues running alongside a tall stone wall topped with cypress trees on the left, creating a more enclosed corridor-like feel. The ancient temple falls behind as the path continues through the desert landscape with brighter morning light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian landscape that transforms from a cool, shadowed gateway into a bright, sun-drenched desert corridor. It begins with the character running between two massive stone sphinx statues under the blue hour light, exiting an ancient gate onto a sandy path. As the lighting warms to a golden hour glow, the camera moves away from the statues and across the open desert, passing ancient stone ruins and a large acacia tree. The scene then shifts toward a rockier terrain as the character approaches an ancient stone temple with towering columns on the left. Finally, the path curves alongside a tall stone wall topped with cypress trees, creating an enclosed feeling as the temple falls behind under the bright morning light.
